title: Freshly Steamed Kenyan Ginger Wrap
description: A traditional Kenyan dish featuring ginger and leaf wraps, this recipe is a comforting and culturally rich experience. The combination of ginger, spinach, and herbs creates a bouncy and qq texture.
instructions: Rinse the collard green leaves and remove the stems.
In a large bowl, mix together the grated ginger, chopped onion, minced garlic, ground coriander, ground turmeric, salt, and black pepper.
Lay a collard green leaf flat on a work surface, with the stem end facing you.
Place about 1/4 cup of the ginger mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining leaves and filling.
Place the rolls in a steamer basket, leaving some space between each roll.
Steam the rolls over boiling water for 10-12 minutes, or until the leaves are tender.
Serve the rolls hot with a squeeze of lemon juice.
